page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmc8ae.64xlarge is a high-density compute-optimized instance powered by the x86_64 architecture. It features 256 dedicated physical cores and 256 vCPUs, utilizing AMD EPYC 9T34 processors running at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each vCPU maps directly to a physical core, eliminating hyperthreading resource sharing and ensuring predictable compute performance.

The instance is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 3.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external block storage solutions for data persistence. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 100 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers across cloud resources.

This hardware profile is designed for massive parallel processing workloads that benefit from dedicated CPU execution units and high network throughput. Suitable workloads include large-scale scientific simulations, high-performance computing, intensive build systems, and highly parallelized compute tasks where resource contention must be avoided.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmc8ae.64xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 256 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T34 physical cores running at 3.4 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, it provides dedicated CPU execution without hyperthreading. The system is configured with 768.0 GB of RAM, offering 3.0 GB per core, and relies entirely on external storage as it contains no local disks. It delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps. This instance is engineered for highly parallelized, compute-intensive workloads such as high-performance computing, large-scale simulations, and intensive compilation tasks that require dedicated CPU resources and high network throughput.

tagline: A high-density compute platform featuring two hundred fifty-six dedicated AMD EPYC cores and one hundred gigabits per second network bandwidth.

768.0 GB of system memory providing 3.0 GB of RAM per core
